headline_seed: Roommate of slain USF student is charged with two counts of murder - NBC News
draft_text: Hisham Abugharbieh, 26, charged with two counts of premeditated murder in the deaths of USF doctoral students Zamil Limon and Nahida Bristy. Abugharbieh was Limon's roommate. He was ordered held without bond Saturday, NBC News and the Los Angeles Times report.
